overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district. The player crosses a futuristic intersection, passes an NCPD armored police vehicle parked outside the NCART transit station, and continues along a neon-lit sidewalk beneath elevated red metal structures and massive digital billboards in a dense cyberpunk urban canyon.

events.description: walking across the yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk toward the NCART station
reaching the opposite curb and approaching the corner with the NCART entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide intersection toward the blue NCART transit building with neon signage

large illuminated advertising screens on building facades displaying colorful cyberpunk graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic urban intersection with the camera crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk toward the NCART transit station. The blue NCART building dominates the center view with its prominent yellow signage, while an NCPD armored vehicle sits parked on the right. Pedestrians wait at the corner ahead, and massive red overhead structures loom above the street against an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit station sidewalk with police vehicle and neon-lit building facade

events.description: passing close to the NCPD armored vehicle which temporarily blocks the right side of view
turning head slightly to observe the police vehicle while continuing to walk forward along the red-trimmed sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the NCART building, passing closely by the parked NCPD vehicle and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and cybernetic implants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: rectangular concrete planter containing small trees and greenery outside the NCART station
distinctive red painted curb and edge along the concrete walking surface

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk beside the NCART station, the camera passes within close proximity to the parked NCPD armored vehicle, revealing its detailed markings and caution lights. The sidewalk features a distinctive red trim, and concrete planters with vegetation line the building facade. The massive red overhead structure becomes more prominent as the camera moves deeper under its cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street under elevated transitway with massive digital billboards

events.description: looking upward at the massive digital billboards and red overhead structure while continuing to walk
approaching an intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily while looking up at the towering billboards and architecture, observing the cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: red futuristic sports car driving past on the multi-lane street

entered.detail: large purple billboard displaying WET DREAM text with graphic imagery
billboard with EL GUAPO text and stylized graphics
futuristic traffic signal posts with illuminated green lights

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a commercial sidewalk beneath the massive red overhead transit structure, surrounded by towering digital billboards including one prominently displaying WET DREAM. The street is busy with futuristic vehicles passing by, and the density of pedestrians increases. The environment feels enclosed and cyberpunk, with neon lighting mixing with the overcast daylight filtering through gaps in the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with high-rise buildings and storefronts

events.description: turning left into a denser urban canyon with tall red and white striped buildings
entering a more crowded section of sidewalk with increased pedestrian density near storefronts

agents.ego_description: navigating through a denser pedestrian area, passing by various cyberpunk-styled characters and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white suit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: distinctive high-rise building with vertical red and white stripes dominating the skyline
enclosed skybridge connecting buildings above the street level
brightly lit shop entrances with colorful neon signage and displays
safety railing along the edge of the sidewalk separating pedestrian and vehicle areas

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a denser urban canyon characterized by a massive red and white striped skyscraper and an overhead pedestrian walkway. The camera navigates through moderate crowds of pedestrians in cyberpunk attire, passing neon-lit storefronts on the right. Yellow safety railings line the street edge as futuristic vehicles pass by, and the environment feels increasingly enclosed by the towering architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open urban intersection into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit cyberpunk canyon. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a blue NCART transit station, passing a parked NCPD armored vehicle under the shadow of massive red overhead structures. As the camera moves along the red-trimmed sidewalk, the environment shifts from the open street to a more enclosed space beneath the transit architecture, where towering digital billboards like the one for WET DREAM begin to dominate the view. The scene then expands into a dense commercial corridor filled with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians, with neon lighting blending into the overcast daylight. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the urban core, navigating through crowds and neon storefronts beneath a red and white striped skyscraper and an overhead pedestrian walkway.
